dialog.stepLabel: Buling: "Boss! What a coincidence! You here for the cable car too?..."

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: Boss! What a coincidence! You here for the cable car too?

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: From up here, the Septimont view is so good! Before I go, I think I will ride a few more times, definitely.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: Yes! My holiday fun in Septimont is already finished. Time to go back.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: You keep it, no need to return! It's a little token of good fortune for us.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: What's real or illusion, hard to say now. Master always said I had bad luck. Easy for me to get into trouble. Guess he was right!

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: Did you realize you were in a Sonoro at the start?

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: I had no idea! For a Taoist like me, it felt like... I dunno, some kind of "out-of-body" thing.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: I asked for your help because... it just felt right. Master always said no need to overthink these things.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: Bye bye, Boss! You're a very fun person.

items.speaker: Buling
items.text: Who knows, maybe we'll meet again someday?
